mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT co.cl_order_id AS clOrderId, c.client_name AS clientName FROM client_order co JOIN client c ON co.client_id = c.client_id WHERE co.cl_order_status = 'CONFIRMED'

SELECT co.cl_order_id, c.client_name, p.product_id, p.product_name, cod.order_qty, COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(remaining_qty) FROM ( SELECT pi.inbound_qty - COALESCE(SUM(po.outbound_qty), 0) AS remaining_qty FROM product_inbound pi LEFT JOIN product_outbound po ON pi.product_id = po.product_id AND pi.lot_no = po.lot_no WHERE pi.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY pi.inbound_id, pi.inbound_qty, pi.expire_date HAVING remaining_qty > 0 ORDER BY pi.expire_date ASC ) AS available ), 0) AS stock_qty
FROM client_order_detail cod JOIN client_order co ON cod.cl_order_id = co.cl_order_id JOIN client c ON co.client_id = c.client_id JOIN product p ON cod.product_id = p.product_id WHERE co.cl_order_status = 'CONFIRMED' GROUP BY co.cl_order_id, c.client_name, p.product_id, p.product_name, cod.order_qty

SELECT cod.detail_id AS orderDetailId, co.cl_order_id AS clOrderId, c.client_name AS clientName, p.product_id, p.product_name, cod.order_qty, COALESCE(ps.stock_qty, 0) AS stockQty, cod.lot_no FROM client_order_detail cod JOIN client_order co ON cod.cl_order_id = co.cl_order_id JOIN product p ON cod.product_id = p.product_id JOIN client c ON co.client_id = c.client_id LEFT JOIN product_stock ps ON p.product_id = ps.product_id WHERE cod.detail_id = #{orderDetailId}
